title: Honey
content:
Young man,
    If you try to eat honey
    On the blade of a knife,
    You will cut yourself.

    If you try to taste honey
    On the kiss of a woman,
    Taste with the lips only,
    If not, young man,
    You will bite your own heart.

    Song of the Tatars.
meaning:
Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Honey"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
